query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.email, p.userId, p.status, u.id as user_id, u.name as user_name, u.openId, u.role FROM patients p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id WHERE p.name LIKE '%Samantha%' OR p.name LIKE '%Buker%';
